div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%
div.p: version : 1; Dernière mise à jour : 2026-01-07 10:12:52+0100; Langue : en

p.b: Cette terminologie de référence (CodeSystem) définit les propriétés suivantes pour ses concepts

tr.td: The internal identifier for the concept in the HL7 Access database repository.
Indicates that the code is abstract - only intended to be used as a selector for other concepts
Designation of a concept's state. Normally is not populated unless the state is retired.
An additional concept code that was also attributed to a concept

div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-SpecimenType defines the following codes dans une hiérarchie Is-A:

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology THO. THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license.html

description.value: The internal identifier for the concept in the HL7 Access database repository.
Indicates that the code is abstract - only intended to be used as a selector for other concepts
Designation of a concept's state. Normally is not populated unless the state is retired.
An additional concept code that was also attributed to a concept
